saved_search_name: ASCERA Status Check - AC.L1-3.1.1 - Unauthorized User with Successful Authentication

search: | inputlookup sp6_assets_by_str | join type=left nt_host     [| tstats `sp6_dm_summariesonly` count latest(_time) AS latest_scan_date values(Vulnerabilities.tag) AS tag from datamodel=Vulnerabilities.Vulnerabilities where earliest=-`sp6_vulnerability_scanning_period`d@d by Vulnerabilities.dest     | rename Vulnerabilities.* AS *     | `filter_system_tags`     | mvexpand cui_system_splunk_id     | eval nt_host=lower(dest) ] | eval latest_scan_date=if(isnotnull(latest_scan_date), "Last Scanned Within 30 Days", "No Scans Within The Last 30 Days") | stats dc(asset) as host_count by latest_scan_date cui_system_splunk_id | append     [| inputlookup sp6_control_status     | stats count by cui_system_splunk_id     | fields - count     | eval count=0, latest_scan_date=0,host_count=0] | eval cui_system_splunk_id =IF(REPLACE(cui_system_splunk_id , " ", "") == "", "None", cui_system_splunk_id ) | search NOT cui_system_splunk_id="None"

saved_search_name: ASCERA Status Check - AU.L2-3.3.1 - Splunk Log Retention Check
search: | metadata type=sources where index=* | sort + firstTime | eval retentionLookDays=`sp6_log_retention_period`| eval retentionLookBack="-".'retentionLookDays'."d@d"| eval logRetentionThreshold=relative_time(now(),'retentionLookBack')| fields - retentionLookDays retentionLookBack| where firstTime<logRetentionThreshold| stats min(firstTime) as oldestEvent dc(source) as sources by logRetentionThreshold | convert ctime(oldestEvent) ctime(logRetentionThreshold) | appendpipe [stats count as sources | where sources=0]
